hints.threads: Number of partitions to check in parallel.
hints.alert: Usage threshold (%). An alert is triggered when disk usage exceeds this value. Overrides the module-level threshold for this partition.
hints.partition: Mountpoint or drive letter to monitor (e.g. / or C:\). If empty, the item key is used as the mountpoint.
hints.label: Display name shown in notifications. Falls back to the item key if empty.
hints.enabled: Enable or disable monitoring for this partition.

ui.discover_error: Could not load the list of mounted partitions
